ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_residues" (
  "residue_index" INTEGER /* Unique index of the residue in the protein sequence */,
  "residue_type" TEXT /* Type of the residue (e.g., N, C, P) */,
  "agma_score" REAL /* Agmata score for the residue */,
  "backbone_score" REAL /* Backbone score for the residue */,
  "coil_score" REAL /* Coil score for the residue */,
  "disoMine_score" REAL /* DisoMine score for the residue */,
  "earlyFolding_score" REAL /* Early folding score for the residue */,
  "helix_score" REAL /* Helix score for the residue */,
  "ppII_score" REAL /* ppII score for the residue */,
  "sheet_score" REAL /* Sheet score for the residue */,
  "sidechain_score" REAL /* Sidechain score for the residue */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure */,
  "chain_id" TEXT /* ID of the chain within the protein structure */,
  "sequence_position" INTEGER /* Position of the residue in the protein sequence */,
  "mutation_status" TEXT /* Mutation status (wild-type or mutant) */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., substitution, deletion, insertion) */,
  "solvent_accessibility" REAL /* Solvent accessibility of the residue */,
  "secondary_structure" TEXT /* Secondary structure of the residue (e.g., helix, sheet, coil) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residue_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_residues_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the protein structure */,
  "structure_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein structure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the protein structure */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the structure was added to the database */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* Full amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the structure */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the structure */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the structure */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the publication or database entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_data" (
  "experimental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental record */,
  "residue_index" INTEGER /* Index of the residue linked to the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment conducted */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "experiment_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the experiment */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the experimental result */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of data validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experimental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_residue_index FOREIGN KEY ("residue_index") REFERENCES protein_residues ("residue_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_data_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is based */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division within the institution */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography or research interests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access log entry */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the researcher (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
